name: Relevant Anti-Virus Signature Keywords In Application Log
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Arnim Rupp
SIGMA Title: Relevant Anti-Virus Signature Keywords In Application Log
SIGMA Description: Detects potentially highly relevant antivirus events in the application log based on known virus signature names and malware keywords.


False positives:
- Some software piracy tools (key generators, cracks) are classified as hack tools

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%adfind%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%asp/backdoor %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%atk/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%backdoor.asp%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%backdoor.cobalt%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%backdoor.jsp%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%backdoor.php%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%blackworm%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%brutel%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%bruter%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%chopper%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cobalt%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cobeacon%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cometer%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cryptes%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cryptor%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%destructor%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%dumpcreds%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%exploit.script.cve%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%fastreverseproxy%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%filecoder%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%grandcrab %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%hacktool%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%hktl%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%htool%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%iisexchgspawncmd%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%impacket%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%jsp/backdoor %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%keylogger%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%koadic%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%krypt%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%lazagne%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%metasploit%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%meterpreter%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%metetool%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%mikatz%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%mimikatz%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%mpreter%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msfshell%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%nighthawk%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%packed.generic.347%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pentestpowershell%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%phobos%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%php/backdoor %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%potato%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%powersploit%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%powerssh%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pshlspy%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pswtool%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pwcrack%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%pwdump%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ransom%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%rozena%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ryzerlo%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%sbelt%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%seatbelt%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%securitytool %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%sharpdump%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%shellcode%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%sliver%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%splinter%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%swrort%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%tescrypt%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%teslacrypt%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%turtleloader%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%valyria%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%webshell%') AND (NOT(((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%anti_ransomware_service.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%crack%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%cyber-protect-service.exe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%keygen%') OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%level%4%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%microsoft-windows-restartmanager%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Relevant Anti-Virus Signature Keywords In Application Log on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%adfind%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%asp/backdoor %' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%atk/%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%backdoor.asp%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%backdoor.cobalt%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%backdoor.jsp%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%backdoor.php%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%blackworm%'
